title: Artifact backend manifest
description: Schema for <plugin>/artifact-backends/<name>/manifest.json. Backends declare which schemes they back and which optional capabilities they provide.

name.description: Backend name. Must match the directory name.

description.description: One-paragraph description of the backend and the external system it wraps.

backs_schemes.description: Schemes this backend can realize. Each must match a provider under some installed plugin's artifact-providers/.

supports_locking.description: True if the backend implements lock/release against this external system.

supports_edges.description: True if the backend can persist and return typed graph edges. False backends may still compute a get-time edges list from backend-native state.

supports_find.description: True if the backend implements reverse edge lookup (find --relation R --target U).

min_poll_interval_s.description: Minimum interval between consecutive status/progress polls against this backend.

env.description: Environment variables the backend requires. Surfaced as a blocker if unset.
